Work

Selected projects & case studies

Modern project showcases focused on measurable outcomes, UX, and engineering discipline.

AI & Analytics

JobSphere AI – Intelligent Job Aggregation & Market Analytics Platform

A full-stack job intelligence platform that aggregates job listings from multiple sources into a unified interface with live market trend visualizations.

ObjectiveTo help job seekers make data-driven career choices by combining job aggregation with market intelligence.
Key Features
  • Job Aggregation from Naukri, LinkedIn, Indeed, etc.
  • Smart filters (experience, location, work-mode, salary)
  • Job Market Analyzer: charts for skill demand, company hiring rate, work-mode
  • Market Intelligence with trending roles and competition scoring
React.jsFastAPIPostgreSQLTailwind CSSRechartsFramer Motion
Discuss Similar Project
Business Automation

Smart Billing & WhatsApp Invoice Management System

A web-based paperless billing application for retail stores that generates invoices, stores them securely, and sends them via the WhatsApp Business API.

ObjectiveTo automate retail billing and customer communications with instant paperless invoices.
Key Features
  • Bill creation and checkout by cashiers
  • Automated WhatsApp invoice delivery to customers and copy to owner
  • Role-based permission: Cashiers create bills, Admins edit and manage history
  • Paperless digital invoice tracking & JWT secure authentication
React.jsDjango REST FrameworkPostgreSQLWhatsApp APIJWT
Discuss Similar Project
IoT & Self-Service

SmartPay PrintHub – IoT-Based Self-Service Printing Kiosk

A web-based printing kiosk system where users upload documents via QR or local device, pay via UPI/Razorpay, and print automatically without manual help.

ObjectiveTo automate the printing process, reducing manual labor and increasing customer convenience in schools, offices, and libraries.
Key Features
  • Document upload via device, USB, or mobile QR scan
  • PDF page count detection & preview with PDF.js
  • Custom print configurations & automatic cost calculation
  • Seamless Razorpay and UPI QR payment integrations
DjangoPostgreSQLUPI QR / RazorpayPDF.jsQRCode.jsBootstrap
Discuss Similar Project
Cybersecurity

Security Assessment of a Native App AI Generated Android APK

A security assessment evaluating an Android APK generated by Native App AI, analyzing network traffic, HTTPS interception, permissions, and malware flags.

ObjectiveTo verify the security of WebView-based APKs generated by AI platforms before release to production.
Key Features
  • Malware scanning of generated APK through VirusTotal API
  • Network traffic monitoring with HTTP Toolkit
  • HTTPS interception testing & runtime vulnerability audit
  • WebView behavior verification & permissions check
Android SecurityVirusTotalHTTP ToolkitAPK AuditingStatic/Dynamic Analysis
Discuss Similar Project
AI & NLP

Social Media Comment Section Analyzer

An automated sentiment and bot detection system that scrapes comment feeds from YouTube, Facebook, and Instagram to extract user sentiments and topic patterns.

ObjectiveTo extract target audience sentiments and detect spam/bot activity across social media channels automatically.
Key Features
  • Comment collection from YouTube, Facebook, Instagram APIs & bots
  • Sentiment classification (Positive, Negative, Neutral)
  • Interactive data visualizations & word cloud extraction
  • Bot detection & spam user identification
PythonYouTube Data APISelenium / PlaywrightNLP / VADERReact
Discuss Similar Project
